title: Feature Review Workbench layout direction
summary: Choose between persistent review context and a guided single-surface drill-down.

sections.title: Primary skeleton · Three-pane density
sections.summary: Navigation, source context, and evidence stay visible together while whole-feature approval remains separate from file Viewed progress.

regions.title: Work and patch-set controls
regions.detail: One toolbar owns Review Slice scope and whole-feature state.

regions.title: Intent navigator
regions.detail: Spec AC, Review Slices, and expected ownership.

regions.title: Source context
regions.detail: Actual hunks, symbols, and findings occupy the largest pane.

regions.title: Verification and governance
regions.detail: Evidence, quality obligations, decisions, and outcomes remain in view.

sections.title: Choose the Feature Review Workbench skeleton
sections.summary: The rival is a descriptive layout direction, not a new domain term in UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md.

options.label: Three-pane density
options.detail: Keep intent navigation, selected source, and evidence/governance visible as coordinated panes.
points: 9/10 · Preserves cross-reference context during dense review.
Requires a deliberate mobile collapse and density controls.

options.label: Single-pane progressive drill-down
options.detail: Move from intent to Review Slice to source to evidence in one focused surface with a breadcrumb trail.
points: 8/10 · Lower visual load and simpler narrow-width behavior.
Reviewers repeatedly lose simultaneous intent, source, and evidence context.
